<span class="a-declarative" data-a-popover='{"max-width":"500","name":"offerDisplayFeatureSecureTransactionPopover-0","activate":"onmouseover","position":"triggerBottom","popoverLabel":"Your transaction is secure"}' data-action="a-popover">
<a class="a-link-normal a-popover-trigger a-declarative" data-csa-c-content-id="odf-desktop-dynamic-secure-transaction" data-csa-c-slot-id="odf-desktop-dynamic-secure-transaction-anchor-text" data-csa-c-type="widget" href="javascript:void(0)" role="button">
<span class="a-size-small offer-display-feature-text-message">
                                     Secure transaction
                                    </span>
</a>
</span>
<div class="a-popover-preload" id="a-popover-offerDisplayFeatureSecureTransactionPopover-0">
<div class="a-section a-padding-base" data-csa-c-content-id="desktop-dynamic-secure-transaction" data-csa-c-slot-id="odf-desktop-dynamic-secure-transaction-popover-description" data-csa-c-type="widget">
<div aria-level="5" class="a-row a-spacing-base" role="heading">
<span class="a-text-bold">
                                      Your transaction is secure
                                     </span>
</div>
<div class="a-row a-spacing-micro">
                                     We work hard to protect your security and privacy. Our payment security system encrypts your information during transmission. We don’t share your credit card details with third-party sellers, and we don’t sell your information to others.
                                     <a class="a-link-normal a-nowrap" data-csa-c-content-id="desktop-dynamic-secure-transaction" data-csa-c-slot-id="odf-desktop-dynamic-secure-transaction-hyperlink" data-csa-c-type="widget" href="/gp/help/customer/display.html?nodeId=201909010" rel="noopener" target="_blank">
<span class="a-size-small">
                                       Learn more
                                      </span>
</a>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="celwidget pd_rd_w-3tSeE pd_rd_r-E8EJWSQY21XV6BBJCD3N pd_rd_wg-UlfSd" data-csa-c-asin="B0D1VWWRSS" data-csa-c-content-id="dynamicSourceMerchantInfoFeature" data-csa-c-is-in-initial-active-row="false" data-csa-c-slot-id="dynamicSourceMerchantInfoFeature_feature_div" data-csa-c-type="widget" data-feature-name="dynamicSourceMerchantInfoFeature" id="dynamicSourceMerchantInfoFeature_feature_div">
</div>

<div class="celwidget" data-csa-c-asin="B0D1VWWRSS" data-csa-c-content-id="addToWishlist" data-csa-c-is-in-initial-active-row="false" data-csa-c-slot-id="addToWishlist_feature_div" data-csa-c-type="widget" data-feature-name="addToWishlist" id="addToWishlist_feature_div">
<hr aria-hidden="true" class="a-spacing-base a-divider-normal"/>
<script type="text/javascript">
                         (function(f) {var _np=(window.P._namespace("ListsDPXJavaScriptBlock"));if(_np.guardFatal){_np.guardFatal(f)(_np);}else{f(_np);}}(function(P) {
window.atwlEarlyClick = function (e) {
    try {
        e.preventDefault();
        if (window.atwlLoaded) {
            return; //if JS is loaded then we can ignore the early click case
        }
        if (window.ue) {
            window.ue.count("Lists:Dpx:atwlEarlyClick:Handled", 1);
        }
        var ADD_TO_LIST_FROM_DETAIL_PAGE_VENDOR_ID = "website.wishlist.detail.add.earlyclick";
        var csrfTokenForm = document.querySelector('input[id="lists-sp-csrf-form-token"]');
        var csrfToken = csrfTokenForm ? csrfTokenForm.value : "";

        var paramMap = {
            "asin": "B0D1VWWRSS",
            "vendorId": ADD_TO_LIST_FROM_DETAIL_PAGE_VENDOR_ID,
            "isAjax": "false"
        }

        var url = "/hz/wishlist/additemtolist?ie=UTF8";

        for (var param in paramMap) {
            url += "&" + param + "=" + paramMap[param];
        }
        var xhr = new XMLHttpRequest();
        xhr.open("POST", url, false);
        xhr.setRequestHeader("anti-csrftoken-a2z", csrfToken);
        xhr.onload = function() {
            window.location = xhr.responseURL; //Needed to force a redirect; not supported on IE!
        }
        xhr.send();
    } catch (exception) {
        if (window.ueLogError) {
            window.ueLogError(exception, {
                logLevel: 'FATAL',
                attribution: 'ListsDPXJavaScriptBlock',
                message: 'atwlEarlyClick failed with exception'
            });
        }
    }
};
}));
                        </script>
<div class="a-button-stack" id="wishlistButtonStack">
<script type="text/javascript">
                          (function(f) {var _np=(window.P._namespace("ListsDPXJavaScriptBlock"));if(_np.guardFatal){_np.guardFatal(f)(_np);}else{f(_np);}}(function(P) {
    'use strict';

    P.when('A').execute(function(A){
        A.declarative('atwlDropdownClickDeclarative', 'click', function(e){                  
          window.wlArrowEv = e;
          e.$event.preventDefault();
          (function () {
             
             if (window.P && window.atwlLoaded) {
                 window.P.when('A').execute(function (A) {A.trigger('wl-drop-down', window.wlArrowEv);})
                 return;
             }
              
             window.atwlEc = true;
             
             var b = document.getElementById('add-to-wishlist-button-group');
             
             var s = document.getElementById('atwl-dd-spinner-holder');
             
             if (!(s && b)) {
                 return;
             }
             s.classList.remove('a-hidden');
             s.style.position = 'absolute';
             s.style.width = b.clientWidth + 'px';
             s.style.zIndex = 1;
             return;
          })();
          return false;
        });
    });
}));
                         </script>
<div class="a-button-group a-declarative a-spacing-none" data-action="a-button-group" data-hover="&lt;!-- If PartialItemStateWeblab is true then, showing different Add-to-wish-list tool-tip message which is consistent with Add-to-Cart tool tip message.  --&gt;
          Select &lt;b&gt;__dims__&lt;/b&gt; from the left&lt;br&gt; to add to Wish List" id="add-to-wishlist-button-group" role="radiogroup">
<span class="a-button a-button-groupfirst a-spacing-none a-button-base" id="wishListMainButton">
<span class="a-button-inner">
<a aria-label="Add to List" class="a-button-text a-text-left" data-hover="&lt;!-- If PartialItemStateWeblab is true then, showing different Add-to-wish-list tool-tip message which is consistent with Add-to-Cart tool tip message.  --&gt;
          Select &lt;b&gt;__dims__&lt;/b&gt; from the left&lt;br&gt; to add to Wish List" href="https://www.amazon.com/ap/signin?openid.return_to=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.amazon.com%2Fgp%2Faw%2Fd%2FB0D1VWWRSS&amp;openid.identity=http%3A%2F%2Fspecs.openid.net%2Fauth%2F2.0%2Fidentifier_select&amp;openid.assoc_handle=usflex&amp;openid.mode=checkid_setup&amp;openid.claimed_id=http%3A%2F%2Fspecs.openid.net%2Fauth%2F2.0%2Fidentifier_select&amp;openid.ns=http%3A%2F%2Fspecs.openid.net%2Fauth%2F2.0&amp;" name="submit.add-to-registry.wishlist.unrecognized" title="Add to List">
                             Add to List
                            </a>
</span>
</span>
</div>
<script type="text/javascript">
                          (function(f) {var _np=(window.P._namespace("ListsDPXJavaScriptBlock"));if(_np.guardFatal){_np.guardFatal(f)(_np);}else{f(_np);}}(function(P) {
    'use strict';

    P.now('A').execute('atwl-a11y-override', function(A){
        
        var addToWishListButtonGroup = document.getElementById('add-to-wishlist-button-group');
        
        if (addToWishListButtonGroup) {
            addToWishListButtonGroup.removeAttribute("role");
        }
        var wishListMainButtonElem = document.getElementById('wishListMainButton');
        if (wishListMainButtonElem) {
            var wishListMainButton = wishListMainButtonElem.querySelector('input');
            if (wishListMainButton) {
                wishListMainButton.setAttribute('role', 'button');
                wishListMainButton.setAttribute('tabindex', '0');
            }
        }
        var wishListDropDownElem = document.getElementById('wishListDropDown');
        if (wishListDropDownElem) {
            var wishListDropDown = wishListDropDownElem.querySelector('input');
            if (wishListDropDown) {
                wishListDropDown.setAttribute('role', 'button');
                wishListDropDown.setAttribute('aria-haspopup', 'dialog');
                wishListDropDown.setAttribute('tabindex', '0');
            }
        }
    });
}));
                         </script>
<div class="a-section a-hidden" id="atwl-inline-spinner">
<div class="a-spinner-wrapper">
<span class="a-spinner a-spinner-medium">
</span>
</div>
</div>
<div class="a-section a-spacing-none a-hidden" id="atwl-inline">
<div class="a-row a-text-ellipsis">
<div aria-atomic="true" aria-live="polite" class="a-box a-alert-inline a-alert-inline-success" id="atwl-inline-sucess-msg">
<div class="a-box-inner a-alert-container">
<i aria-hidden="true" class="a-icon a-icon-alert">
</i>
<div class="a-alert-content">
<span class="a-size-base" role="alert">
                               Added to
                              </span>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<a class="a-link-normal" href="/gp/registry/wishlist/" id="atwl-inline-link">
<span class="a-size-base" id="atwl-inline-link-text" role="alert">
</span>
</a>
</div>
</div>
<div class="a-section a-hidden" id="atwl-inline-error">
<div class="a-box a-alert-inline a-alert-inline-error" role="alert">
<div class="a-box-inner a-alert-container">
<i aria-hidden="true" class="a-icon a-icon-alert">
</i>
<div class="a-alert-content">
<span class="a-size-base" id="atwl-inline-error-msg" role="alert">
                              Unable to add item to List. Please try again.
                             </span>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="a-section a-hidden" id="atwl-dd-spinner-holder">
<div class="a-row a-dropdown">
<div class="a-section a-popover-wrapper">
<div class="a-section a-text-center a-popover-inner">
<div class="a-box a-popover-loading">
<div class="a-box-inner">
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="a-section a-hidden" id="atwl-dd-error-holder">
<div class="a-section a-dropdown">
<div class="a-section a-popover-wrapper">
<div class="a-section a-spacing-base a-padding-base a-text-left a-popover-inner">
<h3 class="a-color-error">
                              Sorry, there was a problem.
                             </h3>
<span>
                              There was an error retrieving your Wish Lists. Please try again.
                             </span>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="a-section a-hidden" id="atwl-dd-unavail-holder">
<div class="a-section a-dropdown">
<div class="a-section a-popover-wrapper">
<div class="a-section a-spacing-base a-padding-base a-text-left a-popover-inner">
<h3 class="a-color-error">
                              Sorry, there was a problem.
                             </h3>
<span>
                              List unavailable.
                             </span>

        }
        .daodi-content {
            position: relative;
            padding-right: 12px;
        }
        .daodi-content .daodi-arrow-icon {
            position: absolute;
            bottom: 40%;
            right: 0;
        }
        .daodi-content a {
            text-decoration: none;
        }

            padding: 12px !important;

        html[dir=rtl] .daodi-content .daodi-arrow-icon {

            left: 0;
            right: auto;
        }

<script type="application/javascript">
             P.when("A", "load").execute("aod-assets-loaded", function(A){
        function logAssetsNotLoaded() {
            if (window.ueLogError) {
                var customError = { message: 'Failed to load AOD assets for WDG: apparel_display_on_website, Device: web' };
                var additionalInfo = {
                    logLevel : 'ERROR',
                    attribution : 'aod_assets_not_loaded'
                };
                ueLogError (customError, additionalInfo);
            }
            if (window.ue && window.ue.count) {
                window.ue.count("aod-assets-not-loaded", 1);
            }
        }

        function verifyAssetsLoaded() {
            var assetsLoadedPageState = A.state('aod:assetsLoaded');
            var logAssetsNotLoadedState = A.state('aod:logAssetsNotLoaded');

            if((assetsLoadedPageState == null || !assetsLoadedPageState.isAodAssetsLoaded)
                && (logAssetsNotLoadedState == null || !logAssetsNotLoadedState.isAodAssetsNotLoadedLogged)) {
                A.state('aod:logAssetsNotLoaded', {isAodAssetsNotLoadedLogged: true});
                logAssetsNotLoaded();
            }
        }

        setTimeout(verifyAssetsLoaded, 50000)
    });
            </script>
</div>

<span class="a-declarative" data-action="ssf-share-icon" data-ssf-share-icon='{"image":"https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/B1pppR4gVKL._CLa%7C500%2C468%7C71xe8T9DcqL.png%7C0%2C0%2C500%2C468%2B0.0%2C0.0%2C500.0%2C468.0_.png","treatment":"C","shareDataAttributes":{"isInternal":false,"isRobot":false,"userAgent":"Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/115.0 Safari/537.36","asin":"B0D1VWWRSS","ingress":"DetailPage","platform":"DESKTOP","requestId":"E8EJWSQY21XV6BBJCD3N","customerId":"","marketplaceId":"ATVPDKIKX0DER"},"deeplinkInfo":{"isDisabled":false,"flag":0},"title":"Funny Data Systems Business Analyst Brewing Data Magic T-Shirt","refererURL":"","storeId":"","locale":"en-US","isIncrementCountEnabled":false,"url":"https://www.amazon.com/dp/B0D1VWWRSS?_encoding=UTF8&amp;psc=1","isTitleTextFixGatingEnabled":true,"isOnShareGatingEnabled":true,"isBestFormatEnabled":false,"weblab":"SHARE_ICON_EXPERIMENT_DESKTOP_671038","mailToUri":"mailto:?body=I%20want%20to%20recommend%20this%20product%20at%20Amazon%0A%0AFunny%20Data%20Systems%20Business%20Analyst%20Brewing%20Data%20Magic%20T-Shirt%0Aby%20Amazon.com%0ALearn%20more%3A%20https%3A%2F%2Fwww.amazon.com%2Fdp%2FB0D1VWWRSS%2Fref%3Dcm_sw_em_r_mt_dp_E8EJWSQY21XV6BBJCD3N%3F_encoding%3DUTF8%26psc%3D1","isOffAmazonSupportEnabled":false,"text":"Funny Data Systems Business Analyst Brewing Data Magic T-Shirt","refId":"dp","shareAapiCsrfToken":"1@gwDBxpFMv2xjzmtR69g+yR1PjI7IMrC0B6/RhgjMncdeAAAAAQAAAABpsn20cmF3AAAAABVX8CwXqz42z+J7i/ABqA==@NLD_B6R8RN","tinyUrlEnabled":true}' id="ssf-primary-widget-desktop">
<div class="ssf-background ssf-bg-count" role="button">
<a aria-haspopup="true" aria-label="Share" class="ssf-share-trigger" data-share='{"background":true}' href="javascript:void(0)" role="button" title="Share">

<script type="text/javascript">
              (function(f) {var _np=(window.P._namespace("DetailPageTellAFriendTemplates"));if(_np.guardFatal){_np.guardFatal(f)(_np);}else{f(_np);}}(function(P) {
            P.when('jQuery','SocialShareWidgetAUI').execute('tellAFriendBox', function($, SocialShareWidget) {
                var OLD_WIDGET = $("[id$='mageBlock_feature_div']").find("[data-action='ssf-share-icon']");

                if(OLD_WIDGET.length) { OLD_WIDGET.remove() }
                
                var LEFT_COL = $("#ppd #leftCol");
                var IMAGEBLOCK = $("[id$='mageBlock_feature_div']");
                var SHARE_WIDGET = $('#ssf-primary-widget-desktop');

                if(LEFT_COL.css('position') !== "sticky") {
                    IMAGEBLOCK.css('position','relative');
                }

                // Attach the share widget to audible title if AUDIBLE_TITLE exists
                function attachShareWidgetToAudibleTitle() {
                    var AUDIBLE_TITLE = $('#audibleproducttitle_feature_div');
                    if (AUDIBLE_TITLE.length) {
                        AUDIBLE_TITLE.prepend(SHARE_WIDGET);

                        SocialShareWidget.init();
                        SHARE_WIDGET.find('.ssf-background').toggleClass('ssf-background ssf-background-float');
                        SHARE_WIDGET.find('.ssf-share-btn').toggleClass('ssf-share-btn ssf-share-btn-float');
                        return true; // successfully attached
                    }

                    return false; // not found yet
                }

                // If AUDIBLE_TITLE doesn't exist add into image block
                if (!attachShareWidgetToAudibleTitle()) {
                    IMAGEBLOCK.prepend(SHARE_WIDGET);
                }
 
                // Set a 1 second timeout to stop waiting for audible div element
                var timeoutId = setTimeout(function () {
                    if (observer && observer.disconnect) {
                        observer.disconnect();
                    }
                    if (interval) clearInterval(interval);
                }, 1000);
 
                // Use MutationObserver for modern browsers to try attaching for audible
                var observer;
                if (window.MutationObserver) {
                    observer = new MutationObserver(function () {
                        if (attachShareWidgetToAudibleTitle()) {
                            observer.disconnect();
                            clearTimeout(timeoutId);
                        }
                    });
 
                    observer.observe(document.body, {
                        childList: true,
                        subtree: true
                    });
                } 

                // Polling fallback for older browsers to try attaching for audible
                var interval;
                if (!window.MutationObserver) {
                    interval = setInterval(function () {
                        if (attachShareWidgetToAudibleTitle()) {
                            clearInterval(interval);
                            clearTimeout(timeoutId);
                        }
                    }, 100);
                }
            });
        }));
             </script>
</div>
</div>

<script type="text/javascript">
      P.when('jQuery', 'atf').execute(function($, atf){
    var $image = $("#landingImage");
    var sizes = $image.data('aDynamicImage');

    if (!sizes || typeof sizes !== 'object'){
      return;
    }
    var $container = $image.data('aDynamicImageContainer');
    if (typeof $container === 'undefined'){
      $container = $image.parents('.aDynamicImageContainer');
      if ($container.length === 0){
        $container = $image.parent();
      }
      $image.data('aDynamicImageContainer', $container);
    }

    var pixelRatio = window.devicePixelRatio ? window.devicePixelRatio : 1;
    var width = $container.width() * pixelRatio;
    var height = $container.height() * pixelRatio;
    var closestSizeDiff = Number.MAX_VALUE;
    var closestLargerSizeDiff = Number.MAX_VALUE;
    var closestUrl = $image.attr('src') || '';
    var closestLargerUrl;
    var aspectRatio = width / height;

    $.each(sizes, function(url, size){
      var proposedHeight = parseInt(size[0], 10);
      var proposedWidth = parseInt(size[1], 10);
      var heightDiff = proposedHeight - height;
      var widthDiff = proposedWidth - width;
      var sizeDiff = aspectRatio >= 1 ? widthDiff : heightDiff;

      if (Math.abs(sizeDiff) < closestLargerSizeDiff && sizeDiff >= 0){
        closestLargerSizeDiff = Math.abs(sizeDiff);
        closestLargerUrl = url;
      }

      if (Math.abs(sizeDiff) < closestSizeDiff){
        closestSizeDiff = Math.abs(sizeDiff);
        closestUrl = url;
      }
    });

    if (closestLargerUrl){
      closestUrl = closestLargerUrl;
    }
    if(closestUrl && closestUrl != ''){
      $image.attr("src",closestUrl);
    }
});
     </script>

                data["altsOnLeft"] = obj.altsOnLeft;
                data["newVideoMissing"] = obj.newVideoMissing;
                data["lazyLoadExperienceDisabled"] = obj.lazyLoadExperienceDisabled;
                data["lazyLoadExperienceOnHoverDisabled"] = obj.lazyLoadExperienceOnHoverDisabled;
                data["useChromelessVideoPlayer"] = obj.useChromelessVideoPlayer ? 1 : 0;
                data["colorToAsin"] = obj.colorToAsin;
                data["ivRepresentativeAsin"] = obj.ivRepresentativeAsin;
                data["ivImageSetKeys"] = obj.ivImageSetKeys;
                data["useIV"] = obj.useIV ? 1 : 0;
                data["tabletWeb"] = obj.tabletWeb ? 1 : 0;
                data["views"] = obj.views;
                data["enhancedHoverOverlay"] = obj.enhancedHoverOverlay;
                data["landingAsinColor"] = obj.landingAsinColor;
                data["colorImages"] = obj.colorImages;
                data["heroImage"] = obj.heroImages;
                data["spin360ColorEnabled"] = obj.enable360Map;
                data["staticImages"] = obj.staticImages;
                data["staticStrings"] = obj.staticStrings;
                data["useChildVideos"] = obj.useChildVideos ? 1 : 0;
                data["useClickZoom"] = obj.useClickZoom ? 1 : 0;
                data["useHoverZoom"] = obj.useHoverZoom ? 1 : 0;
                data["useHoverZoomIpad"] = obj.useHoverZoomIpad ? 1 : 0;
                data["visualDimensions"] = obj.visualDimensions;
                data["isLargeSCLVideoThumbnail"] = obj.largeSCLVideoThumbnail;
                data["mainImageSizes"] = obj.mainImageSizes;
                data["displayVideoBanner"] = obj.displayVideoBanner;
                data["mainImageHeightPartitions"] = obj.mainImageHeightPartitions;
                data["mainImageMaxSizes"] = obj.mainImageMaxSizes;
                data["heroFocalPoint"] = obj.heroFocalPoint;
                data["showMagnifierOnHover"] = obj.showMagnifierOnHover ? 1 : 0;
                data["disableHoverOnAltImages"] = obj.disableHoverOnAltImages ? 1 : 0;
                data["overrideAltImageClickAction"] = obj.overrideAltImageClickAction ? 1 : 0;
                data["naturalMainImageSize"] = obj.naturalMainImageSize;
                data["imgTagWrapperClasses"] = obj.imgTagWrapperClasses;
                data["prioritizeVideos"] = obj.prioritizeVideos;
                data["usePeekHover"] = obj.usePeekHover;
                data["fadeMagnifier"] = obj.fadeMagnifier;
                data["repositionHeroImage"] = obj.repositionHeroImage;
                data["heroVideoVariant"] = obj.heroVideoVariant;
                data["videos"] = obj.videos;
                if (obj.totalVideoCount != null) {
                  data["totalVideoCount"] = obj.totalVideoCount;
                }
                data["productGroupID"] = obj.productGroupID;
                data["title"] = obj.title;
                data["airyConfigEnabled"] = obj.airyConfigEnabled;
                if (obj.airyConfigEnabled) {
                  data["airyConfig"] = obj.airyConfig;
                }
                data["isDPXFeatureEnabled"] = true;
                data["useTabbedImmersiveView"] = obj.useTabbedImmersiveView;
                data["vseVideoDataSourceTreatment"] = obj.vseVideoDataSourceTreatment;
                data["rankingStrategy"] = obj.rankingStrategy;
                data["contentWeblab"] = obj.contentWeblab;
                data["contentWeblabTreatment"] = obj.contentWeblabTreatment;
                data["useVSEVideos"] = obj.useVSEVideos;
                data["dpRequestId"] = obj.dpRequestId;
                data["mediaAsin"] = obj.mediaAsin;
                data["parentAsin"] = obj.parentAsin;
                data["dp60VideoThumbMap"] = obj.dp60VideoThumbMap;
                data["videoBackgroundChromefulMainView"] = obj.videoBackgroundChromefulMainView;
                data["enableS2WithoutS1"] = obj.enableS2WithoutS1;
                data["customerId"] = obj.customerId;
                data["twisterInteractionSimplificationEnabled"] = true;
                data["requestedAsinColor"] = obj.landingAsinColor;
                return data;
            });
       </script>
</div>
</div>

<script type="text/javascript">
      window.$Nav && $Nav.when('$').run('CBIMarketplaceRedirectOverlayNavyaan', function($) {
        $.ajax({
            type: 'POST',
            url: '/cross_border_interstitial_sp/render',
            data: JSON.stringify({
                marketplaceId: 'ATVPDKIKX0DER',
                localCountryCode: 'US',
                   customerId: null,
                sessionId: '131\x2D2259900\x2D4857001',
                deviceType: 'DESKTOP',
                referrer: '',
                url: '\x2FData\x2DSystems\x2DBusiness\x2DAnalyst\x2DBrewing\x2Fdp\x2FB0D1VWWRSS\x2Fref\x3Dsr_1_1',
                pageType: 'Detail',
                languageOfPreference: 'en_US',
                queryParams: {"searchKeyword":"funny+data+systems+business+analysts"},
                interstitialRequestType: 'CBI',
                weblabTreatmentMap: {"CBI_355055":"C","NARX_INTERSTITIAL_NEW_CX_372291":"C","NARX_INTERSTITIAL_AUI_MIGRATION_446901":"C","TEST_ACS_CONFIGURATION_486322":"C","CROSS_BORDER_INTERSTITIAL_ACS_SHADOW_TESTING_486317":"C","INTERSTITIAL_PROTOTYPE_IP_ADDRESS_BR_598850":"C","NARX_INTERSTITIAL_LAMBDA_CLOUD_AUTH_880645":"C","CBI_ROBOT_MITIGATION_943387":"C","CBI_REDISPLAY_INTERSTITIAL_1008859":"C"}
            }),
            contentType: "application/json",
            dataType: "html",
            success: function(data) {
                if (data) {
                    $('body').append(data);
                }
            }
        });
      });
     </script>

<style>
                              .grid-container {
            display: block;
            flex-direction: column;
        }

        .grid-row {
            align-items: center;
            margin-bottom: 10px;
            margin-left: 20px;
        }

        .grid-label {
            min-width: 50px;
            padding-right: 10px;
        }

        .widgetAlerts {
            display: none;
        }

        .grid-input {
            flex: 1;
            width: 100%
        }

        .asterisk {
            color: #EB0000;
        }

        .visually-hidden {
            position: absolute;
            width: 1px;
            height: 1px;
            margin: -1px;
            padding: 0;
            overflow: hidden;
            clip: rect(0, 0, 0, 0);
            border: 0;
        }
        .priceavailability{
            padding: 0 28px;
        }
        @media (min-width: 420px) and (max-width: 550px){
            .container{
                display: block;
            }
            .grid-input{
                font-size: 85%;

            }
            .priceavailability{
                padding: 0 28px;
            }
            .a-dropdown-container .a-button-dropdown .a-button-text{
                font-size: 79%;
            }



        }
        @media (min-width: 320px) and (max-width: 419px) {
            .priceavailability{
                padding: 0 0px;
            }
            .container{
                display: block;
            }

            .grid-input{
                font-size: 80%;
            }
            input#offlineCity.grid-input{
                font-size: 62%;
            }
            span#stateValue{
                .grid-input
                {
                    font-size: 77%;
                }

            }
            .a-dropdown-container .a-button-dropdown .a-button-text{
                font-size: 65%;
            }



        }
                             </style>
<div>
<div class="detailPageWidgetBlock" id="pricingFeedbackDiv">
<span class="a-declarative" data-action="pricingFeedback-modal-button" data-pricingfeedback-modal-button="{}">
                                Would you like to
                                <b>
<a class="a-popover-trigger a-declarative" href="javascript:void(0)" role="button">
                                  tell us about a lower price?
                                  <i class="a-icon a-icon-popover">
</i>
</a>
</b>
</span>
</div>
<div class="a-popover-preload" id="a-popover-pricingFeedback-modal-content">
<div class="contentContainer" id="pricingFeedback_contentContainer" style="overflow: auto;">
<div id="feedbackForm">
<div id="pricingFeedback_titleBar">
<div class="container" style="display: flex;">
<div style="width: 30%;">
<img alt="" border="0" height="75" src="https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/B1pppR4gVKL._CLa%7C500%2C468%7C71xe8T9DcqL.png%7C0%2C0%2C500%2C468%2B0.0%2C0.0%2C500.0%2C468.0_SS75_.png" tabindex="0" width="75"/>
</div>
<div style="flex-grow: 1;">
<p tabindex="0">
                                     Funny Data Systems Business Analyst Brewing Data Magic T-Shirt
                                    </p>
<p id="permalink">
<b>
                                      Share:
                                     </b>
</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div id="pricingFeedback_content">
</div>
<hr/>
<p tabindex="0">
                                  Found a lower price? Let us know. Although we can't match every price reported, we'll use your feedback to ensure that our prices remain competitive.
                                 </p>
<h2 tabindex="0">
                                  Where did you see a lower price?
                                 </h2>
<p id="note1" style="display: none" tabindex="0">
                                  Fields with an asterisk
                                  <span aria-hidden="true" class="asterisk">
                                   *
                                  </span>
                                  are required
                                 </p>
<div class="priceavailability">
<fieldset aria-labelledby="PriceAvailabilitySection" role="radiogroup">
<legend class="visually-hidden">
                                    Price Availability
                                   </legend>
<fieldset aria-labelledby="OnlinePriceAvailabilitySection" role="group">
<legend>
<div id="onlineRadioContainer" style="display: flex">
<input id="pricingFeedback_onlineRadio" name="retailerType" type="radio" value="online"/>
<label for="pricingFeedback_onlineRadio">
                                       Website (Online)
                                      </label>
</div>
</legend>
<div class="grid-container" id="pricingFeedback_onlineInput">
<div class="grid-row">
<label class="grid-label" for="onlineUrl" id="onlineUrlLabel">
                                       URL
                                       <span class="asterisk">
                                        *
                                       </span>
                                       :
                                      </label>
<div class="a-fixed-left-grid-col a-col-right grid-input">
<input aria-required="true" class="grid-input" id="onlineUrl" maxlength="500" name="onlineUrl" placeholder="Enter URL where you found the price lower" size="32" type="text"/>
<div class="a-box a-alert-inline a-alert-inline-error auth-inlined-error-message a-spacing-top-mini widgetAlerts" id="onlineUrl-missing-alert" role="alert">
<div class="a-box-inner a-alert-container">
<i class="a-icon a-icon-alert">
</i>
<span class="a-alert-content" id="urlAlert">
</span>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="grid-row">
<label class="grid-label" for="onlinePriceRaw" id="onlinePriceRawLabel">
                                       Price
                                        (KES)
                                       <span class="asterisk">
                                        *
                                       </span>
                                       :
                                      </label>
<div class="a-fixed-left-grid-col a-col-right grid-input">
<input aria-required="true" class="grid-input" id="onlinePriceRaw" maxlength="10" name="onlinePriceRaw" placeholder="Enter the price of the product" size="20" type="number"/>
<div class="a-box a-alert-inline a-alert-inline-error auth-inlined-error-message a-spacing-top-mini widgetAlerts" id="onlinePrice-missing-alert" role="alert">
<div class="a-box-inner a-alert-container">
<i class="a-icon a-icon-alert">
</i>
<span class="a-alert-content" id="priceAlertOnline">
</span>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="grid-row">
<label class="grid-label" for="onlineShippingRaw" id="onlineShippingRawLabel">
                                       Shipping cost
                                        (KES):
                                      </label>
<div class="a-fixed-left-grid-col a-col-right grid-input">
<input aria-required="false" class="grid-input" id="onlineShippingRaw" maxlength="10" name="onlineShippingRaw" placeholder="Enter the shipping price, If any" size="20" type="number"/>
<div class="a-box a-alert-inline a-alert-inline-error auth-inlined-error-message a-spacing-top-mini widgetAlerts" id="onlineShippingPrice-missing-alert" role="alert">
<div class="a-box-inner a-alert-container">
<i class="a-icon a-icon-alert">
</i>
<span class="a-alert-content" id="priceShippingAlertOnline">
</span>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div aria-labelledby="onlineCalendarLabel" class="grid-row" role="group">
<label class="grid-label" for="onlineCalendar" id="onlineCalendarLabel">
                                       Date of the price
                                        (MM/DD/YYYY):
                                      </label>
<div class="a-fixed-left-grid-col a-col-right grid-input">
<div>
<div id="onlineCalendar">
<div class="monthSection" style="flex: 1; float: left; display: inline-block;">
<span aria-expanded="false" aria-haspopup="listbox" class="a-dropdown-container" role="combobox" title="month">
<select aria-hidden="false" aria-label="Select Month" autocomplete="off" class="month-select a-native-dropdown a-native-dropdown" data-a-native-class="a-native-dropdown" id="onlineMonth" name="onlineMonth">
<option class="a-prompt" id="onlineMonthOptionDefault" value="">
</option>
<option value="1">
                                             01
                                            </option>
<option value="2">
                                             02
                                            </option>
<option value="3">
                                             03
                                            </option>
<option value="4">
                                             04
                                            </option>
<option value="5">
                                             05
                                            </option>
<option value="6">
                                             06
                                            </option>
<option value="7">
                                             07
                                            </option>
<option value="8">
                                             08
                                            </option>
<option value="9">
                                             09
                                            </option>
<option value="10">
                                             10
                                            </option>
<option value="11">
                                             11
                                            </option>
<option value="12">
                                             12
                                            </option>
</select>
<span aria-hidden="true" class="a-button a-button-dropdown a-button-small a-button-width-normal">
<span class="a-button-inner">
<span aria-hidden="false" class="a-button-text a-declarative" data-action="a-dropdown-button" role="button">
<span class="a-dropdown-prompt" id="onlineMonthPrompt">
</span>
</span>
<i class="a-icon a-icon-dropdown">
</i>
</span>
</span>
</span>
</div>
<div class="firstDelimiter" style="flex: 1; float: left; display: inline-block;">
                                          /
                                         </div>
<div class="daySection" style="flex: 1; float: left; display: inline-block;">
<div>
<span aria-expanded="false" aria-haspopup="listbox" class="a-dropdown-container" role="combobox" title="day">

<option value="28">

<option value="29">

                                             </option>
<option value="30">
                                              30
                                             </option>
<option value="31">
                                              31
                                             </option>
</select>
<span aria-hidden="true" class="a-button a-button-dropdown a-button-small a-button-width-normal">
<span class="a-button-inner">
<span aria-hidden="false" class="a-button-text a-declarative" data-action="a-dropdown-button" role="button">
<span class="a-dropdown-prompt" id="onlineDatePrompt">
</span>
</span>
<i class="a-icon a-icon-dropdown">
</i>
</span>
</span>
</span>
</div>
</div>
<div class="secondDelimiter" style="flex: 1; float: left; display: inline-block;">
                                          /
                                         </div>
<div class="yearSection" style="flex: 1; float: left; display: inline-block;">
<div>
<span aria-expanded="false" aria-haspopup="listbox" class="a-dropdown-container" role="combobox" title="year">
<select aria-hidden="false" aria-label="Select Year" autocomplete="off" class="a-native-dropdown a-native-dropdown" data-a-native-class="a-native-dropdown" id="onlineYear" name="onlineYear">
<option id="onlineYearOptionDefault" selected="selected" value="">
</option>
</select>
<span aria-hidden="true" class="a-button a-button-dropdown a-button-small a-button-width-normal">
<span class="a-button-inner">
<span aria-hidden="false" class="a-button-text a-declarative" data-action="a-dropdown-button" role="button">

</span>

</i>

</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</fieldset>
<fieldset aria-labelledby="OfflinePriceAvailabilitySection" role="group">
<legend>
<div id="offlineRadioContainer" style="display: flex;margin-top: 10px">
<input id="pricingFeedback_offlineRadio" name="retailerType" type="radio" value="offline"/>
<label for="pricingFeedback_offlineRadio">
                                       Store (Offline)
                                      </label>
</div>
</legend>
<div class="grid-container" id="pricingFeedback_offlineInput">
<div class="grid-row">
<label class="grid-label" for="offlineStoreName" id="storeLabel">
                                       Store name
                                       <span class="asterisk">
                                        *
                                       </span>
                                       :
                                      </label>
<div class="a-button-inner a-dropdown-container grid-input" id="storeValue" style="font-size: 11px">
<select aria-required="true" autocomplete="off" class="a-native-dropdown a-button-span10 a-native-dropdown" data-a-native-class="a-native-dropdown" id="offlineStoreName" name="offlineStoreName">
<option class="a-prompt" id="storeDefaultOption">
                                         Enter the store name where you found this product
                                        </option>
</select>
<span aria-hidden="true" class="a-button a-button-dropdown a-button-span10" id="offlineStoreNameMain">
<span class="a-button-inner">
<span aria-hidden="true" class="a-button-text a-declarative" data-action="a-dropdown-button" role="button">
<span class="a-dropdown-prompt" id="storeDefaultPrompt">
                                           Enter the store name where you found this product
                                          </span>
</span>
<i class="a-icon a-icon-dropdown">
</i>
</span>
</span>
</div>
<div class="a-box a-alert-inline a-alert-inline-error auth-inlined-error-message a-spacing-top-mini widgetAlerts" id="offlineStoreName-missing-alert" role="alert">
<div class="a-box-inner a-alert-container">
<i class="a-icon a-icon-alert">
</i>
<span class="a-alert-content" id="storeAlert">
</span>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="grid-row">
<label class="grid-label" for="offlineCity" id="offlineCityLabel">
                                       City
                                       <span class="asterisk">
                                        *
                                       </span>
                                       :
                                      </label>
<input aria-required="true" class="grid-input" id="offlineCity" maxlength="100" name="offlineCity" placeholder="Enter the city where you found this product" size="32" type="text"/>
<div class="a-box a-alert-inline a-alert-inline-error auth-inlined-error-message a-spacing-top-mini widgetAlerts" id="offlineCity-missing-alert" role="alert">
<div class="a-box-inner a-alert-container">
<i class="a-icon a-icon-alert">
</i>
<span class="a-alert-content" id="cityAlert">
</span>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="grid-row">
<label class="grid-label" for="offlineState" id="stateLabel">
                                       State:
                                      </label>
<span class="a-button-inner a-dropdown-container grid-input" id="stateValue" style="font-size: 11px">
<select aria-required="false" autocomplete="off" class="a-native-dropdown a-button-span10 a-native-dropdown" data-a-native-class="a-native-dropdown" id="offlineState" name="offlineState">
<option class="a-prompt" id="stateDefaultOption">
                                         Please select province
                                        </option>
</select>
<span aria-hidden="true" class="a-button a-button-dropdown a-button-span10" id="offlineStateMain">
<span class="a-button-inner">
<span aria-hidden="true" class="a-button-text a-declarative" data-action="a-dropdown-button" role="button">
<span class="a-dropdown-prompt" id="stateDefaultPrompt">
                                           Please select province
                                          </span>
</span>
<i class="a-icon a-icon-dropdown">
</i>
</span>
</span>
</span>
</div>
<div class="grid-row">
<label class="grid-label" for="offlinePriceRaw" id="offlinePriceRawLabel">
                                       Price
                                        (KES)
                                       <span class="asterisk">
                                        *
                                       </span>
                                       :
                                      </label>
<div class="a-fixed-left-grid-col a-col-right grid-input">
<input aria-required="true" class="grid-input" id="offlinePriceRaw" maxlength="10" name="offlinePriceRaw" placeholder="Enter the price of the product" size="20" type="number"/>
<div class="a-box a-alert-inline a-alert-inline-error auth-inlined-error-message a-spacing-top-mini widgetAlerts" id="offlinePriceRaw-missing-alert" role="alert">
<div class="a-box-inner a-alert-container">
<i class="a-icon a-icon-alert">
</i>
<span class="a-alert-content" id="priceAlertOffline">
</span>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>

<label class="grid-label" for="offlineCalendar" id="offlineCalendarLabel">
                                       Date of the price
                                        (MM/DD/YYYY):
                                      </label>
<div class="a-fixed-left-grid-col a-col-right grid-input">
<div>
<div id="offlineCalendar">
<div class="monthSection" style="flex: 1; float: left; display: inline-block;">
<span aria-expanded="false" aria-haspopup="listbox" class="a-dropdown-container" role="combobox" title="month">

</option>

                                            </option>

                                            </option>

                                            </option>
</select>
<span aria-hidden="true" class="a-button a-button-dropdown a-button-small a-button-width-normal">
<span class="a-button-inner">
<span aria-hidden="true" class="a-button-text a-declarative" data-action="a-dropdown-button" role="button">

</span>
</span>
<i class="a-icon a-icon-dropdown">
</i>

                                          /
                                         </div>
<div class="daySection" style="flex: 1; float: left; display: inline-block;">
<div>
<span aria-expanded="false" aria-haspopup="listbox" class="a-dropdown-container" role="combobox" title="day">
<select aria-hidden="false" aria-label="Select day" autocomplete="off" class="day-select a-native-dropdown a-native-dropdown" data-a-native-class="a-native-dropdown" id="offlineDay" name="offlineDay">

                                          /

<div>
<span aria-expanded="false" aria-haspopup="listbox" class="a-dropdown-container" role="combobox" title="year">
